build.description: Full build agent — writes models, views, serializers, tests. Use for implementation sprints.

plan.description: Read-only planning agent. Use this FIRST on every sprint to review the plan before building.

review.description: Code review agent — checks for tenant-scoping errors, permission gaps, and state machine violations. Invoke with @review.

security-check.description: Security-focused review agent. Checks for cross-tenant leaks, webhook signature bypass, payment fee tampering, and JWT misuse. Invoke with @security-check before any auth/payment/document PR.
